mapper.insert: insert into EMPLOYEE_INFO (USER_ID, DEPT_CD, JBGR_CD, EMPL_STAT_CD) values (#{userId}, #{deptCd}, #{jbgrCd}, #{emplStatCd})
mapper.select: SELECT ei.user_id, m.user_name, ei.dept_cd, d.dept_nm, ei.jbgr_cd, jg.jbgr_nm, jg.sort_ord FROM EMPLOYEE_INFO ei JOIN MEMBER m ON ei.user_id = m.user_id JOIN JOB_GRADE jg ON ei.jbgr_cd = jg.jbgr_cd JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON ei.dept_cd = d.dept_cd WHERE ei.empl_stat_cd = '01' AND ei.user_id != #{userId} AND jg.sort_ord < ( SELECT jg2.sort_ord FROM EMPLOYEE_INFO ei2 JOIN JOB_GRADE jg2 ON ei2.jbgr_cd = jg2.jbgr_cd WHERE ei2.user_id = #{userId} ) ORDER BY d.dept_nm, jg.sort_ord

select ei.user_id, ei.dept_cd, ei.jbgr_cd, ei.empl_stat_cd, jg.jbgr_nm
from EMPLOYEE_INFO ei inner join job_grade jg on ei.jbgr_cd = jg.jbgr_cd where ei.DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} and jg.sort_ord = 1
